productName: Ooowee - JUICED Hydrocarbon Concentrate - Seattle Strawberry Cough - Seattle Strawberry Cough - 1g
description: A workhorse sativa dab: Seattle Strawberry Cough run through a closed-loop butane extraction and finished to a smooth, high-potency concentrate. Smooth and high-potency, a sweet, juicy strawberry flavor, leading into an upbeat, talkative energy.
